mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in industrial production signals a strengthening demand cycle that boosts corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate signals a tightening labor market that compresses wage growth and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening labor market periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the federal funds rate signals a tightening monetary cycle that compresses equity valuations and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in tightening monetary periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in housing starts signals a strengthening demand cycle that boosts corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the real GDP signal a strengthening supply cycle that boosts corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening supply periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals a easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days, when the real GDP growth rate is above 2%.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing monetary periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in payroll employment signals a tightening labor market that compresses wage growth and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days, when the unemployment rate is below 6%.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening labor market periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real personal spending signals a strengthening demand cycle that boosts corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days, when the industrial production growth rate is above 2%.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
